product_name: Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Tom Nook

bullets: Officially licensed Animal Crossing: New Horizons collectible statue
Faithfully captures Tom Nook's appearance, from his droopy eyes to his brown fur
Every detail of Tom Nook's attire, including the Nook Inc. aloha shirt and khaki shorts, meticulously replicated
Highly detailed base inspired by the Animal Crossing: New Horizons art style
content.description: The statue faithfully captures Tom Nook's appearance, from his droopy eyes to his brown fur. Every detail of Tom Nook's attire, from the Nook Inc. aloha shirt to the khaki shorts, has been meticulously replicated. The highly detailed base is inspired by the Animal Crossing: New Horizons art style.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Tom Nook painted PVC statue
• Highly detailed base inspired by Animal Crossing: New Horizons
• F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
